ddls:
CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "price_aprox_usd" INTEGER /* Approximate price of the property in USD */,
  "surface_total_in_m2" INTEGER /* Total surface area of the property in square meters */,
  "surface_covered_in_m2" INTEGER /* Covered surface area of the property in square meters */,
  "rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms in the property */,
  "barrio_match" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the property is located */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., active, sold, withdrawn) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the listing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the listing */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate agent who created the listing */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "garage_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of garage spaces */,
  "floor" INTEGER /* Floor number for apartments */,
  "parking_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces */,
  "heating_type" TEXT /* Type of heating system */,
  "cooling_type" TEXT /* Type of cooling system */,
  "property_tax" INTEGER /* Annual property tax */,
  "hoa_fee" INTEGER /* Monthly homeowners' association (HOA) fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_barrio_match FOREIGN KEY ("barrio_match") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or region where the neighborhood is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the neighborhood is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate of the neighborhood */,
  "school_rating" INTEGER /* Average school rating in the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., apartment, house, condo) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., pool, gym, parking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image representing the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listing_features" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature for the specific listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id", "feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., real estate agent, marketer, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the listing */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of favorites for the listing */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the listing */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the listing */,
  "inquiries" INTEGER /* Number of inquiries received for the listing */,
  "showings" INTEGER /* Number of showings for the listing */,
  "average_view_time" REAL /* Average time a user spends viewing the listing */,
  "lead_source" TEXT /* Source of the leads (e.g., website, referral, direct) */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the listing (e.g., percentage of inquiries that result in sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id")
)
